title: T-042 — ncr_root_cause_categories reference table seed (ADR-034)
prompt:
# T-042 — ncr_root_cause_categories reference seed

PRD: §16.3 ADR-034 tenant-configurable taxonomies, §8.3 QUA-105 rcCat usage, §11.4 V-QA-NCR-005

## Goal
Register ncr_root_cause_categories reference table + seed 10 baseline rows + server helper getRootCauseCategories. Consumer: ncr_close_modal (T-046) rcCat select.

## Implementation contract
Migration 0133 + helper + tests. Seeds: human_error_training, procedure_inadequate, equipment_failure, raw_material_quality, environmental_temp_humidity, packaging_defect, allergen_cross_contact, microbiological_contamination, foreign_object_glass_metal_plastic, other.

## Files
- packages/db/migrations/0133_ncr_root_cause_categories_reftable.sql [create]
- apps/web/src/server/quality/ncr/rootCauseCategories.ts [create]
- apps/web/src/server/quality/ncr/__tests__/rootCauseCategories.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. 10 seed rows exist with pl+en i18n
2. getRootCauseCategories returns 10 rows ordered stably
3. Validator rejects bad parent_category

## Test strategy (RED first)
- RED: rootCauseCategories.test.ts before migration
- Run 'pnpm --filter db migrate && pnpm --filter web test rootCauseCategories'

## Risk red lines
- No hardcode in modal
- i18n column mandatory

pipeline_inputs.description: Register ncr_root_cause_categories reference table (tenant-configurable per ADR-034) and seed 10 baseline categories used by ncr_close_modal/QA-009a detail.
pipeline_inputs.details: Migration 0133 inserts reference_tables registry row code='ncr_root_cause_categories' with schema_json {code,label,parent_category,category,i18n jsonb}. Seeds 10 rows: human_error_training, procedure_inadequate, equipment_failure, raw_material_quality, environmental_temp_humidity, packaging_defect, allergen_cross_contact, microbiological_contamination, foreign_object_glass_metal_plastic, other. Server helper apps/web/src/server/quality/ncr/rootCauseCategories.ts. PRD anchors: §16.3 ADR-034 mention 'ncr_root_cause_categories is a tenant-configurable reference table' (QUA-105 paragraph line 1083); §8.3 QUA-105 lists rcCat select usage in ncr_close_modal; §11.4 V-QA-NCR-005 ties root_cause_category to closure.
out_of_scope: Do not implement NCR close Server Action here (T-038)
Do not build ncr_close_modal UI here (T-046)
acceptance_criteria: Given migration 0133 applied, when SELECT FROM reference_tables_rows WHERE table_code='ncr_root_cause_categories' runs, then exactly 10 seed rows exist with i18n keys for pl and en
Given tenant context, when getRootCauseCategories(orgId) is called, then it returns 10 rows ordered stably by (category, label)
Given a row insert with parent_category not matching an existing row code or NULL, then the reference_tables JSON-schema validator rejects it (referential integrity within reference data)
test_strategy: RED: rootCauseCategories.test.ts asserting count + ordering + parent_category validation before migration
Run 'pnpm --filter db migrate && pnpm --filter web test rootCauseCategories'
risk_red_lines: Do not hardcode categories in ncr_close_modal (must remain reference-table per ADR-034)
